# External layer GeoJSON

Normalized snapshot-backed map layers live here.

These files are the frontend-ready derivatives of raw downloads stored in
`data/caldeira/snapshots/`. They should:
- use stable filenames
- be safe to import via `?url`
- include enough metadata for provenance and refresh auditing

Planned files:
- `caldeira-geosgb-geology.geojson`
- `caldeira-sigmine-tenements.geojson`
- `caldeira-anm-geology.geojson`
- `caldeira-snirh-stations.geojson`
